name: Thermal PI Controller Simulation
prompt: Read scenario.json which describes a thermal control system. The plant is a first-order system: dT/dt = (1/plant_tau) * (-T + ambient_temp + plant_gain * u), where u is the control signal (heater power, 0 to max_power) and T is the temperature. Design a PI controller using IMC tuning rules (choose lambda = plant_tau/2 for moderate response) to maintain the temperature at setpoint. Simulate for total_steps with timestep dt. At step disturbance_start, ambient_temp drops by disturbance_magnitude. Write results to thermal_output.json with keys: temperatures (array), control_signals (array), errors (array of setpoint - temperature).

criteria.description: Steady state error is small before disturbance

origin.notes: auto-converted from legacy skill-bench TaskDefinition by tools/convert-from-skill-bench.ts
